queries.question: Empirical analysis of the mitigating effect of loan duration in months on credit default probability and risk determinants.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of elevated credit risk associated with the absence of a checking account and its contribution to default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how minimal checking account balances between zero and two hundred DM influence credit risk drivers and increase default probability.
